articles.description: Manchester City will hope their dominant Carabao Cup final win piles pressure on Arsenal in the Premier League title race, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Arsenal 0-2 Man City: Will Carabao Cup final win pile pressure on Arsenal?

articles.description: How does Igor Tudor survive at Tottenham after another damaging defeat? Nick Mashiter analyses the situation.
articles.title: Tottenham: 'Impossible for him to stay' - what next for Igor Tudor and Spurs?

articles.description: Carabao Cup LIVE reaction: Manchester City beat Arsenal at Wembley to lift the trophy and end Arsenal's ambitious hopes of the quadruple.
articles.title: Carabao Cup LIVE: Man City beat Arsenal to win first trophy of the season

articles.description: There is no hiding place for a manager when your decisions go wrong, and Mikel Arteta's call to stick by cup goalkeeper Kepa Arrizabalaga will haunt him.
articles.title: Kepa Arrizabalaga: Mikel Arteta's 'sentimental' goalkeeping decision that hurt Arsenal

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Real Madrid vs Atletico Madrid in the Spanish La Liga
articles.title: Real Madrid vs Atletico Madrid: Spanish La Liga stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Keely Hodgkinson captures her first world indoor title in commanding fashion as she claims 800m gold with a championship record in Poland.
articles.title: World Athletics Indoor Championships 2026: Keely Hodgkinson wins 800m gold

articles.description: Is Gennaro Gattuso ready to guide Italy, who have not qualified for a World Cup since 2014, to the finals in the USA, Canada and Mexico this summer?
articles.title: Italy v Northern Ireland: From 'risky' to 'hero' - Can Gennaro Gattuso guide the Azzurri back to World Cup?

articles.description: World number one Carlos Alcaraz is knocked out of the Miami Open after a surprise 6-3 5-7 6-4 defeat to Sebastian Korda.
articles.title: Miami Open: World number one Carlos Alcaraz suffers surprise defeat to American Sebastian Korda in third round

articles.description: Nico O'Reilly will be the pride of Manchester following his man-of-the-match showing in City's brilliant Carabao Cup final victory over Arsenal on Sunday.
articles.title: Arsenal 0-2 Man City: Nico O'Reilly's fairytale continues after Wembley double

articles.description: Managers often get it wrong when it comes to picking World Cup squads - is one packed with stars always the best option?
articles.title: Taking wildcards, leaving out stars - the art of World Cup squad building
